      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz greef tawu Wai-

irr/ un fluddina prett winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un redsi/ Es peelifschu pee

nas effi pabeidsis.
"

    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nenimees Kweefchus/ un

jas/ Putraimu un Rudsus/ un

ri tew no teem Maises/ pehz to
Deenu Pulka/ famehr tu us ta-
wn Sahnu gullefi/ trihfimts un
dewindeſmits Deenas buhs tew
to ehft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta ka tawa Barriba/ ko

"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,

"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew buhs Meeschn Kar-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KlNGS fazzija:

"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija es: Ak KlNGS
UN GS! Redsi/ manna
vehfele wehl ne irr fagahnita

"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,

      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija

"

    {
      "n": 16,

Swarra/ un ar Sird-Ebsteer

"

    {
